description: Dark mode contrast and i18n rendering tests

tests.name: login form labels visible on white card in dark mode

steps.script: (() => { const labels = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="login-form"] label, [data-testid="login-form"] .form-label'); if (!labels.length) throw new Error('No labels found'); labels.forEach(l => { const m = getComputedStyle(l).color.match(/\d+/g); if (!m) throw new Error('No color on label'); const [r,g,b] = m.map(Number); if (r+g+b > 500) throw new Error('Label too light on white card: rgb('+r+','+g+','+b+')'); }); })()

tests.name: login uses M3 checkbox not native input

steps.script: if (!document.querySelector('[data-testid="login-form"] [class*="mdc-checkbox"]')) throw new Error('Expected M3 Checkbox component')

tests.name: locale dropdown text readable in dark mode

steps.script: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="locale-switcher"]'); if (!el) throw new Error('locale-switcher not found'); const m = getComputedStyle(el).color.match(/\d+/g); if (!m) throw new Error('No color on switcher'); const [r,g,b] = m.map(Number); if (r+g+b < 300) throw new Error('Dropdown text too dark for dark bg: rgb('+r+','+g+','+b+')'); })()

tests.name: locale dropdown menu items visible when open

steps.script: (() => { const items = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="mat-mdc-menu-item"]'); if (!items.length) throw new Error('No menu items found'); const panel = items[0].closest('[class*="panel"]'); if (!panel) throw new Error('No panel ancestor found'); const bgM = getComputedStyle(panel).backgroundColor.match(/\d+/g); if (!bgM) throw new Error('No bg color on panel'); const bgSum = bgM.map(Number).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); items.forEach(i => { const m = getComputedStyle(i).color.match(/\d+/g); if (!m) throw new Error('No color on menu item'); const sum = m.map(Number).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0); if (bgSum < 300 && sum < 300) throw new Error('Dark text on dark bg'); if (bgSum > 500 && sum > 500) throw new Error('Light text on light bg'); }); })()

tests.name: theme toggle icon has sufficient stroke width

steps.script: (() => { const svg = document.querySelector('[data-testid="theme-toggle-button"] svg'); if (!svg) throw new Error('No theme icon SVG'); const sw = Number(svg.getAttribute('stroke-width')); if (sw < 10) throw new Error('strokeWidth too thin: '+sw+' (need >=10)'); })()

tests.name: bell icon has sufficient stroke width

steps.script: (() => { const svg = document.querySelector('[data-testid="notification-bell-button"] svg'); if (!svg) throw new Error('No bell icon SVG'); const sw = Number(svg.getAttribute('stroke-width')); if (sw < 10) throw new Error('strokeWidth too thin: '+sw+' (need >=10)'); })()

tests.name: html lang matches locale for Japanese

steps.script: if (document.documentElement.lang !== 'ja') throw new Error('Expected lang=ja, got '+document.documentElement.lang)
